title: centaurea calcitrapa subsp. horrida
intro: Centaurea calcitrapa subsp. horrida, also known as Horrid Thistle, is a subspecies of the Centaurea calcitrapa plant, a type of thistle that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea calcitrapa subsp. horrida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Centaurea calcitrapa subsp. horrida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
